response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No reference lyrics needed as this is a streaming video with spoken commentary. 2. JSON Usage: N/A. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all spoken English comments by the main streamer (Ina) as well as the audible Japanese voices from other players on the server, ensuring accurate start/end points and seamless translation of Japanese server chatter.

subtitles.original: Do I have one to make more chests?
subtitles.english: Do I have one to make more chests?

subtitles.original: I mean, at the end of the day, if it seems like we can't get to...
subtitles.english: I mean, at the end of the day, if it seems like we can't get to...

subtitles.original: ...18 million, then we can lower it...
subtitles.english: ...18 million, then we can lower it...

subtitles.original: ...to one digit lower, you know? That can always be arranged.
subtitles.english: ...to one digit lower, you know? That can always be arranged.

subtitles.original: We can just buy enough coins...
subtitles.english: We can just buy enough coins...

subtitles.original: ...to lower our... our earnings.
subtitles.english: ...to lower our... our earnings.

subtitles.original: Or we go big, and then bet everything as big coins.
subtitles.english: Or we go big, and then bet everything as big coins.

subtitles.original: Who knows?
subtitles.english: Who knows?

subtitles.original: Maybe we'll hit that diamond mine.
subtitles.english: Maybe we'll hit that diamond mine.

subtitles.original: But that's... that's only if it feels like 18 million...
subtitles.english: But that's... that's only if it feels like 18 million......

subtitles.original: ...goal is not reachable tomorrow.
subtitles.english: ...goal is not reachable tomorrow.

subtitles.original: Cuz we don't know what the balance patch is gonna be.
subtitles.english: Cuz we don't know what the balance patch is gonna be.

subtitles.original: Cuz getting the exact digits down, I think is gonna be pretty difficult.
subtitles.english: Cuz getting the exact digits down, I think is gonna be pretty difficult.

subtitles.original: But I think like... I could like just lower it enough and then like...
subtitles.english: But I think like... I could like just lower it enough and then like...

subtitles.original: ...cuz like I can... I can just like dig uh dirt and only get like one gold, right? So...
subtitles.english: ...cuz like I can... I can just like dig uh dirt and only get like one gold, right? So...

subtitles.original: ...maybe it is doable.
subtitles.english: ...maybe it is doable.

subtitles.original: Like, like sell it and/or like get rid of money more than usual and then earn up one by one.
subtitles.english: Like, like sell it and/or like get rid of money more than usual and then earn up one by one.

subtitles.original: Four more minutes. Okay. Can I do it?
subtitles.english: Four more minutes. Okay. Can I do it?

subtitles.original: Or I can ask help from Anya to buy some specific amount of...
subtitles.english: Or I can ask help from Anya to buy some specific amount of...

subtitles.original: ...money's worth of something.
subtitles.english: ...money's worth of something.

subtitles.original: Should I just sell today? I think I should...
subtitles.english: Should I just sell today? I think I should...

subtitles.original: Do I sell or...
subtitles.english: Do I sell or...

subtitles.original: I don't have enough space.
subtitles.english: I don't have enough space.

subtitles.original: Oh, I guess I have a couple more.
subtitles.english: Oh, I guess I have a couple more.

subtitles.original: Sell today? Okay.
subtitles.english: Sell today? Okay.

subtitles.original: I need to at least leave five for the... melon seeds.
subtitles.english: I need to at least leave five for the... melon seeds.

subtitles.original: Leave the stuff I don't need.
subtitles.english: Leave the stuff I don't need.

subtitles.original: Alright, no need for egg anymore.
subtitles.english: Alright, no need for egg anymore.

subtitles.original: Okay, six minutes, that's plenty of time.
subtitles.english: Okay, six minutes, that's plenty of time.

subtitles.original: Okay, we shall free them into the wild tomorrow.
subtitles.english: Okay, we shall free them into the wild tomorrow.

subtitles.original:
グレしか出ない！
これ、これ。
やばい。ちょっと一緒に、一緒に動いてくれ。
subtitles.english:
Only gray is coming out!
This one, this one.
No way. Come on, move with me, move with me.

subtitles.original: グレしか出ない！
subtitles.english: Only gray is coming out!

subtitles.original: 結構、結構ありだと思うんだけどな。
subtitles.english: I think it's pretty good, though.

subtitles.original: Now, forget about the bees.
subtitles.english: Now, forget about the bees.

subtitles.original: がんばろう！
subtitles.english: Let's do our best!

subtitles.original: ３千本いくぞ！
subtitles.english: Let's go for 3000!

subtitles.original: Or maybe I should just leave all the boxes out. Probably easier.
subtitles.english: Or maybe I should just leave all the boxes out. Probably easier.

subtitles.original: やばい、４分だ！
subtitles.english: Oh no, 4 minutes left!

subtitles.original:
ちょっと待って。
急げ！急げ！
subtitles.english:
Wait a minute.
Hurry up! Hurry up!
